options.name: <out_file>
options.description: The name for the output file to be written.

options.name: -checkpoint
options.description: Name of LEC checkpoint file to save at the end.

options.name: -golden_design
options.description: The user-written netlist file name to use as the golden design.

options.name: -log_file
options.description: Name of the LEC log file.

options.name: -no_exit
options.description: Skip the exit Command at end of do file.

options.name: -pre_compare
options.description: An extra dofile to be sourced right before 'set_system_mode'.

options.name: -pre_exit
options.description: An extra dofile to be sourced right before 'exit'.

options.name: -pre_read
options.description: An extra dofile to be sourced right before reading library/design.

options.name: -revised_design
options.description: The user-written netlist file name to use as the revised design.

options.name: -verbose
options.description: Whether the generated dofile reports verbosely.

options.name: -write_session
options.description: Name of LEC session to save at the end. (string, optional) > <file> # The name for the output file to be written.
